problem id: fcc6dff6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(2)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  01100010 -> 00111011
  01100111 -> 10111001
  10100011 -> 00111000
  00010100 -> 11010111
  00101000 -> 10101111
  10110010 -> 10111110
  11001010 -> 01111010
  10010111 -> 01110101
  00000110 -> 11110011

query: 11101010
predicted answer: 00111010
